meaning: n.[律]保证,保证书,担保物,抵押物vt.保证,抵押,担保
examples: He had done so in a previous trial arising out of the collapse of Madison Guaranty in 1990, and he had been acquitted.
GST's pension benefits would get passed on to the federal Pension Benefit Guaranty Corp.
The company is looking to push its underfunded pension into the Pension Benefit Guaranty Corp.
Life insurers are also backstopped by guaranty associations, whose benefit limits vary by state.
